title: perityle cochisensis
intro: Perityle cochisensis, also known as the Cochise's globemallow, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family. It is a succulent shrub that grows in the southwestern United States and Mexico, with medicinal properties attributed to its roots and stems. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and wounds. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Perityle cochisensis include infusions and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its health benefits.
